title: hesperis suaveolens
intro: Hesperis suaveolens, also known as sweet rocket or sweet gilliflower, is a flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hesperis suaveolens include its ability to help alleviate congestion, soothe sore throats, and reduce fever. Hesperis suaveolens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
